description_long: This is a vintage, open-wheel race car with a streamlined, elongated body painted in a mustard yellow color. The car features large, exposed black tires with white hubcaps, and the front wheels are separated from the main body by curved fenders. The cockpit is open, with a single seat and visible steering wheel, and the engine compartment is detailed with metallic exhaust pipes running along the sides. The rear of the car is characterized by two large, round exhaust pipes and a tapered tail section. Chrome and metallic accents are visible throughout, giving the car a classic, early 20th-century racing aesthetic.
description: A vintage, mustard yellow open-wheel race car with large exposed tires, chrome accents, and a streamlined body.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow nose, curved fenders, and the open cockpit behind the front wheels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated body, side exhaust pipe, and large rear wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual exhaust pipes, tapered tail, and wide rear tires.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible exhaust and detailed wheel structure.
